div.head:
No. 405.
Mr. Bayard to Mr. Curry.
div.p: Mr. Bayard informs Mr. Curry that he is instructed to state to the Government of Spain that the accommodation of all differences is equally and earnestly desired by the President, and that, if notified that the Spanish Government will levy no discrimination against American vessels and cargoes which, they carry from the United States or any foreign country, the proclamation of 1884 will be renewed by him.
